title: Mob to Egg
description: SHIFT + right click with carrot on a stick to convert a mob to a spawn egg!
body:
# Mob to Egg Converter
**<font color="Gold">Transform</font>** any mob into its spawn egg with a simple **<font color="DeepSkyBlue">SHIFT + Right-click</font>**!

For anyone who wants an **easy way** to collect and **<font color="Violet">relocate mobs</font>**!

---

## 🎯 Core Features

- **Precision Targeting** - uses advanced raycast technology to accurately detect the mob you're looking at
- **80+ Mobs Supported** - works with passive, neutral, hostile, and special mobs
- **Simple Controls** - just SHIFT + Right-click with a Carrot on a Stick
- **Audio & Visual Feedback** - hear sounds and see particles when conversion is successful
- **25 Block Range** - convert mobs from up to 25 blocks away
- **Performance Optimized** - efficient raycast system that doesn't lag your game
- **No Resource Pack** - pure datapack solution, works out of the box

---

## 🎮 How to Use

1. **Get a Carrot on a Stick** - craft or obtain one from creative inventory
2. **Find a Mob** - locate the mob you want to convert
3. **Aim at the Mob** - look directly at the mob
4. **Hold SHIFT** - press and hold your sneak key
5. **Right-Click** - use your Carrot on a Stick
6. **Collect the Egg** - the mob disappears and drops its spawn egg!

---

## 📦 Installation

Follow these steps to install the datapack:

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file
2. Navigate to your Minecraft world folder
3. Place the `.zip` file in the `datapacks` folder
4. Reload the world or use `/reload` command in-game
5. You should see a **<font color="LimeGreen">confirmation message</font>** in chat!

### World Folder Location

- **Windows:** `%appdata%\.minecraft\saves\[WorldName]\datapacks`
- **macOS:** `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/saves/[WorldName]/datapacks`
- **Linux:** `~/.minecraft/saves/[WorldName]/datapacks`

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

| Component | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **Minecraft Version** | 1.21.11 (Java Edition) |
| **Pack Format** | 94 |
| **Dependencies** | None |
| **Resource Pack** | Not required |

---

## ✨ Supported Mobs

### **<font color="LimeGreen">Passive Mobs</font>**
> Allay, Armadillo, Axolotl, Bat, Camel, Cat, Chicken, Cod, Cow, Donkey, Fox, Frog, Glow Squid, Horse, Mooshroom, Mule, Ocelot, Parrot, Pig, Pufferfish, Rabbit, Salmon, Sheep, Skeleton Horse, Sniffer, Snow Golem, Squid, Strider, Tadpole, Tropical Fish, Turtle, Villager, Wandering Trader

### **<font color="Orange">Neutral Mobs</font>**
> Bee, Cave Spider, Dolphin, Drowned, Enderman, Goat, Iron Golem, Llama, Panda, Piglin, Polar Bear, Spider, Trader Llama, Wolf, Zombified Piglin

### **<font color="Crimson">Hostile Mobs</font>**
> Blaze, Bogged, Breeze, Creeper, Elder Guardian, Endermite, Evoker, Ghast, Guardian, Hoglin, Husk, Magma Cube, Phantom, Piglin Brute, Pillager, Ravager, Shulker, Silverfish, Skeleton, Slime, Stray, Vex, Vindicator, Warden, Witch, Wither Skeleton, Zoglin, Zombie, Zombie Villager

---

## 🤝 Compatibility

- ✅ Works in both **Survival** and **Creative** mode
- ✅ Compatible with most other datapacks
- ✅ **<font color="DeepSkyBlue">Multiplayer friendly</font>**
- ✅ Works with modded mobs that follow vanilla spawn egg naming conventions

---

## 🔧 Technical Details

### How it Works

The datapack uses:

- **Scoreboard objectives** for right-click detection
- **Predicates** for sneak detection  
- **Raycast system** for accurate mob targeting (up to 25 blocks)
- **Execute commands** for mob type detection and conversion

### File Structure

```
mob_to_egg/
├── pack.mcmeta
└── data/
    ├── minecraft/
    │   └── tags/
    │       └── function/
    │           ├── load.json
    │           └── tick.json
    └── mob_to_egg/
        ├── predicate/
        │   └── is_sneaking.json
        └── function/
            ├── load.mcfunction
            ├── tick.mcfunction
            ├── raycast.mcfunction
            ├── raycast_step.mcfunction
            ├── convert_mob.mcfunction
            ├── convert_mob_from_raycast.mcfunction
            └── spawn_egg_by_type.mcfunction
```

### Debug Commands

```
/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar click
```

This will show you if right-clicks are being registered properly.

---

## 🎬 Preview

### What Happens When You Convert a Mob

When you successfully convert a mob:

- 💨 **Particle effects** appear at the mob's location
- 🔊 **Chicken egg sound** plays
- 💚 **Green success message** appears in your action bar
- 🥚 **Spawn egg** drops at the mob's location

---

## ⚠️ Known Limitations

- **Boss mobs** (Ender Dragon, Wither) cannot be converted - they don't have spawn eggs in vanilla Minecraft
- **Armor Stands** and **Item Entities** are excluded from conversion
- Requires a **Carrot on a Stick** as the interaction item (Minecraft limitation for detecting right-clicks)

---
